evals.expected_output: Fetches PR via gh pr view, gets diff, summarizes changes by area, runs security-reviewer agent, checks project-specific issues, runs lint and tsc

assertions.name: fetches-pr-metadata
assertions.description: Runs gh pr view with --json to get PR title, body, files, additions, deletions

assertions.name: gets-diff
assertions.description: Runs gh pr diff to get the full changeset

assertions.name: groups-by-area
assertions.description: Summarizes changes grouped by area: UI/components, data fetching, Supabase, config, other

assertions.name: security-review
assertions.description: Invokes the security-reviewer subagent on changed files

assertions.name: checks-process-env
assertions.description: Checks for process.env usage in changed files

assertions.name: checks-company-id
assertions.description: Checks that Supabase queries in changed files include company_id filter

assertions.name: runs-lint-and-tsc
assertions.description: Runs npm run lint and npx tsc --noEmit

assertions.name: output-format
assertions.description: Output follows the structured format: Summary, Changed Files table, Security Review, Project-Specific Checks, Code Quality, Recommendation

evals.expected_output: Uses PR number 42 directly, follows full review pipeline

assertions.name: uses-pr-number
assertions.description: Uses PR #42 directly in gh commands, doesn't try to resolve from branch

assertions.name: recommendation-given
assertions.description: Ends with APPROVE / REQUEST CHANGES / COMMENT recommendation with justification
